creative_brief: Clean, founder-voice layout. Rachel's signature at close. Single upgrade CTA button below the final paragraph, above the disclaimer. Warm off-white background, no hero image needed.
subject: You're on the list. Here's what that actually means.
preheader: No commitment. Order when you want. Collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday.
body:
Hi {first_name},

Someone asked me last week: "What do I actually get by joining the FarmThru waitlist?"

I realised I'd never spelled it out. So here it is.

You're first to know when our Brookvale hub opens. You'll get early access to order direct from farms like Rachel's Farm, before we open to the public. No commitment. Order when you want. Collect Monday to Friday.

That's the waitlist. It's genuinely useful, and it costs nothing.

But there's a second thing happening alongside it.

We're raising a crowdfunding round on Birchal so everyday people can own a piece of FarmThru, not just shop here. VIP supporters get to see the offer 24 hours before anyone else, on the morning of 23 June.

To lock in VIP access, there's a small refundable deposit. If you decide not to invest when the round opens, it comes straight back to you. No questions.

If you want to be a partner in this, not just a customer, upgrading takes about 60 seconds.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
